## What changed

-

## Product fit

- [ ] This keeps Dayline minimal and day-centered.
- [ ] This does not turn Dayline into a project-management/dashboard product.
- [ ] Tasks, habits, Dayline events, and external calendar events remain semantically clear.

## Frontend/API/backend contract

- [ ] Frontend API types match backend response shapes.
- [ ] Raw provider payloads are not exposed to normal UI code.
- [ ] OAuth tokens/secrets are not exposed to the browser.

## Verification

- [ ] Frontend lint/test/build/check run where relevant.
- [ ] Backend lint/test/build run where relevant.
- [ ] Calendar provider behavior manually checked where relevant.
